A

activeThreshold(int, boolean) - Method in class Business.CartManager
Checks if the loyalty threshold discount is active for a specific shop and purchase.
adaptShop(Shop) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Adapts a generic Shop object to its specific subclass based on the business model.
adaptStringToFirstMayus(String) - Method in class Presentation.UIManager
Adapts a String so it has it first letter in mayus.
addAlreadySaidShop(String) - Method in class Business.CartManager
Adds a shop to the list of shops where the threshold discount is activated.
addMoreIncomeToShops(ArrayList<String>, ArrayList<Float>) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Adds additional income to the specified shops.
addProduct(ArrayList<String>, String) - Method in class Business.ProductManager
Adds a new product with the specified attributes to the product list.
addProductsReviews(String) - Method in class Business.Products.SpecificProduct
Adds a review for the shop.
addProductToCart(String, String, String, String, String) - Method in class Business.CartManager
Adds a product to the shopping cart.
addProductToShop(String, String, String, String, ArrayList<String>) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Adds a new product to a shop if the conditions are met.
addRatings(String) - Method in class Business.Products.SpecificProduct
Adds a rating to the product.
addReviewToProduct(String, String, String) - Method in class Business.ProductManager
Adds a review with a rating to a specific product.
addReviewToProductInShop(String, String, String) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Adds a review and rating to a specific product in a shop's catalogue.
addShop(ArrayList<String>, String, String) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Adds a new shop to the system based on the provided attributes.
alreadyInJsonDAO(String, String) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Checks if a product with the given name is already present in the shop's catalogue.
askForFloat(String) - Method in class Presentation.UIManager
Collects a float input from the user, handling potential exceptions.
askForInt(String, int, int) - Method in class Presentation.UIManager
Collects an integer input from the user within a specified range.
askForMainMenu() - Method in class Presentation.UIManager
Presents the main menu to the user and collects their choice.
askForManageProductMenu() - Method in class Presentation.UIManager
Presents the menu for managing product-related actions and collects the user's choice.
askForManageShopMenu() - Method in class Presentation.UIManager
Presents the menu for managing shop-related actions and collects the user's choice.
askForSelectedStrings(boolean, String) - Method in class Presentation.UIManager
Collects a selected string option from the user, validating against specified options.
askForString(String) - Method in class Presentation.UIManager
Collects a string input from the user.
